### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://mcp.notion.com:443/mcp HTTP/1.1
Accept: application/json\, text/event-stream
Accept-Encoding: br\, gzip\, deflate
Accept-Language: REDACTED
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connection: keep-alive
Content-Type: application/json
Host: mcp.notion.com
Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors
User-Agent: Cursor/2.6.11 (win32 x64)
```

```
{
  "method": "initialize",
  "params": {
    "protocolVersion": "2025-11-25",
    "capabilities": {
      "elicitation": {
        "form": {}
      },
      "roots": {
        "listChanged": false
      },
      "extensions": {
        "io.modelcontextprotocol/ui": {
          "mimeTypes": [
            "text/html;profile=mcp-app"
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    "clientInfo": {
      "name": "cursor-vscode",
      "version": "1.0.0"
    }
  },
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 0
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type\, mcp-session-id
Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET\, POST\, OPTIONS
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: mcp-session-id
Access-Control-Max-Age: 86400
Alt-Svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
Cache-Control: no-cache
Cf-Ray: REDACTED
Connection: keep-alive
Content-Type: text/event-stream
Date: Thu\, 05 Mar 2026 02:36:56 GMT
Mcp-Session-Id: REDACTED
Server: cloudflare
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload
Vary: Accept-Encoding
```

```














event: message
data: {"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 0, "result": {"protocolVersion": "2025-06-18", "capabilities": {"tools": {"listChanged": true}, "resources": {"listChanged": true}, "completions": {}}, "serverInfo": {"name": "Notion MCP", "version": "1.2.0", "description": "Notion's official MCP server lets you use your Notion workspace as a system of record for knowledge work and software development. Search questions about the codebase and business, fetch links to pages such as tech specs and PRDs, and track tasks with your team.", "websiteUrl": "https://developers.notion.com/docs/mcp", "icons": [{"src": "https://mcp.notion.com/notion-logo-block-main.svg", "mimeType": "image/svg+xml"}]}}}
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"id": 0, "jsonrpc": "2.0", "method": "initialize", "params": {"capabilities": {"elicitation": {"form": {}}, "extensions": {"io.modelcontextprotocol/ui": {"mimeTypes": ["text/html;profile=mcp-app"]}}, "roots": {"listChanged": false}}, "clientInfo": {"name": "cursor-vscode", "version": "1.0.0"}, "protocolVersion": "2025-11-25"}}
http:url is /mcp
```
